title: 'IT: Welcome to Derry' Outshines the Best Horror Movie of 2025 on U.S. Streaming Charts
text: The Stephen King prequel series has dominated HBO's streaming platform, surpassing Weapons on the U.S. charts. The show premiered October 26, 2025, and quickly became a cultural phenomenon. The series earned a Certified Fresh rating of 78% based on 114 critic reviews on Rotten Tomatoes, with an even stronger audience score of 80%. Within its opening three days, the first episode attracted 5.7 million U.S. viewers, marking it the third most-watched HBO Max series premiere in history, behind only House of the Dragon and The Last of Us. The show was developed by Andy Muschietti, Barbara Muschietti, and Jason Fuchs, who also worked on the 2017 and 2019 films. Bill Skarsgård reprises his role as the villain Pennywise, while the ensemble cast includes Taylour Paige, Jovan Adepo, and Chris Chalk. The series continues to air new episodes weekly through December.
